evals.prompt: 我想做一个 API 网关服务，供公司内部各个微服务使用。大概需要路由转发、认证鉴权、限流、日志。
evals.expected_output: The skill should first confirm design_target_type=system, then confirm problem, scope, and assumptions, and produce a design_state-first tree using the system skeleton. It should treat persistence to docs/design-tree as a repo-local default once the tree becomes stable enough to reference safely, not as an opt-in behavior.

assertions.name: target_type_confirmed_first
assertions.description: The first confirmation step asks for or confirms design_target_type before other sections

assertions.name: system_skeleton_used
assertions.description: The resulting tree uses system-oriented branches such as core objects, core flows, and interfaces/data

assertions.name: repo_local_persistence_default_used
assertions.description: The output treats docs/design-tree persistence as the repo-local default after the stable-to-reference threshold rather than a user-request-only behavior

evals.prompt: 帮我设计一个线上事故复盘工作流，需要覆盖事故确认、负责人分配、原因分析、行动项跟踪和复盘关闭。
evals.expected_output: The skill should confirm design_target_type=workflow and produce a tree centered on stages, handoffs, rollback/escalation, and quality gates rather than system components.

assertions.name: workflow_target_type_used
assertions.description: The output explicitly sets design_target_type to workflow

assertions.name: workflow_skeleton_used
assertions.description: The tree uses workflow branches such as stages, inputs/outputs, handoffs, rollback, and quality gates

evals.prompt: 我想整理一套代码研究方法论，核心是决定读哪些文件、什么时候停下来、什么时候需要回头补样本。
evals.expected_output: The skill should confirm design_target_type=methodology and produce a tree around applicability, decision rules, handoff form, and exit conditions.

assertions.name: methodology_target_type_used
assertions.description: The output explicitly sets design_target_type to methodology

assertions.name: methodology_skeleton_used
assertions.description: The tree uses methodology branches such as applicability, decision rules, handoff form, and exit conditions

evals.prompt: 我们要设计一套多技能路由框架，核心是按任务类型和风险级别把工作路由到不同 skill，并定义统一 handoff 形式。
evals.expected_output: The skill should confirm design_target_type=framework and produce a tree around dimensions, modules, routing rules, handoff forms, and exit conditions.

assertions.name: framework_target_type_used
assertions.description: The output explicitly sets design_target_type to framework

assertions.name: framework_skeleton_used
assertions.description: The tree uses framework branches such as dimensions, modules, routing rules, handoff forms, and exit conditions

evals.prompt: 帮我把最近一周的设计讨论整理成一份研究报告，按背景、过程、结论写出来。
evals.expected_output: This should not be treated as design-structure. The request is report writing, not initial design-state construction.

assertions.name: rejects_report_writing
assertions.description: Output makes it clear that report writing is outside design-structure's boundary

evals.prompt: 我给你一篇设计文档，你帮我读完以后总结重点就行。
evals.expected_output: This should not be treated as design-structure. The request is document summarization, not creating a new design tree.

assertions.name: rejects_document_summary
assertions.description: Output keeps document summarization outside the design-structure boundary

evals.prompt: 给我一个最简单的发布 SOP，5 步之内，别搞复杂。
evals.expected_output: This should not be treated as design-structure. A simple linear SOP without a design-state problem is outside scope.

assertions.name: rejects_simple_sop
assertions.description: Output rejects simple SOP drafting as outside design-structure

evals.prompt: 帮我设计一个消息推送系统，支持 App 推送、短信、邮件三种渠道。
evals.expected_output: The skill should still confirm design_target_type first, build design_state, and treat persistence to docs/design-tree as the repo-local default once the design reaches the stable-to-reference threshold. It should not describe saving as something that happens only because the user asked for it.

assertions.name: persistence_not_request_only
assertions.description: The output does not frame persistence as user-request-only behavior

assertions.name: design_state_still_primary
assertions.description: The skill still frames the result as design_state-first rather than file-first

evals.prompt: 父设计树 docs/design-tree/api-gateway.md 已经确认需要把限流策略单独展开。请为这个子问题创建派生设计树，并按仓库规则命名保存文件。
evals.expected_output: The skill should create a derived tree with explicit parent/child boundaries and use a repo-local derived filename like docs/design-tree/api-gateway--rate-limiting.md rather than a generic part-2, refinement, or v2 suffix.

assertions.name: derived_tree_parent_child_boundary_explicit
assertions.description: The output makes parent/child ownership and the derivation reason explicit

assertions.name: derived_tree_repo_local_naming_rule_used
assertions.description: The output uses a parent--child filename pattern for the derived tree instead of a generic continuation suffix

evals.prompt: 继续细化消息推送系统设计树，还是同一个问题域，只是补充失败重试和回退策略。按仓库规则处理文件命名，别新开一个 v2 文件。
evals.expected_output: The skill should keep the same authoritative file path for ordinary refinement of the same design lineage rather than inventing a new v2/final/new filename. If it mentions a save path, it should reuse the existing root path for that lineage.

assertions.name: same_lineage_reuses_same_path
assertions.description: The output reuses the same authoritative file path for ordinary refinement of the same design lineage

assertions.name: avoids_v2_suffix_for_normal_refinement
assertions.description: The output avoids naming normal same-lineage refinement as v2, final, new, or similar suffixes
